title: athyrium umbrosum
intro: Athyrium umbrosum, also known as the Lady's Hair Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family (Athyriaceae) characterized by its delicate and lacy fronds. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Athyrium umbrosum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also sometimes used in topical applications for skin irritations and wounds.
